channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: It's your last chance to get record-low prices on Amazon Fire TV Sticks — plus a huge sale on Amazon's answer to Samsung's The Frame art TV
item.description: Don't miss lowest-ever prices on Fire TV Sticks, or on the new Ember Artline TV.

item.title: How People in China Keep Outsmarting Anthropic’s Geolocation Restrictions
item.description: As Anthropic tightens restrictions on access to Claude in China, users keep finding new workarounds, from proxy services to fake identities sourced on Telegram.

item.title: Samsung’s Excellent OLED Monitors Are Up to 36 Percent Off for Prime Day
item.description: Samsung makes some of the very best OLED gaming monitors, and they’ve never been this affordable.

item.title: How to watch Uruguay vs Spain: Free Streams, TV Channels and Kick-Off time as FIFA World Cup 2026 favorites aim to finish top of Group H
item.description: Here's how to watch Uruguay vs Spain for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as Lamine Yamal & Co. aim to seal top spot in Group H.

item.title: Bumble in serious decline as it considers sale, reports say
item.description: Dating app Bumble is exploring a sale amid financial struggles.

item.title: 50+ Prime Day outdoor deals: Last chance to grab rare Yeti cooler deals
item.description: We've rounded up the best Amazon Prime Day outdoor deals from brands like Yeti, Anker Solix, Solo Stove, LifeStraw, and more.

item.title: Best Ninja Prime Day Deals (2026) Slushi, Creami, Crispi, Cafe Luxe
item.description: Ninja Creami Swirl, Crispi, Slushi, and Cafe Luxe Pro are all on Prime Day deals that will soon go away.

item.title: Amazon devices are heavily discounted on Prime Day — shop Fire TVs and Kindles on sale
item.description: Shop Amazon devices during Prime Day. Fire TVs, Blink security cameras, and more are up to 65% off during the sale's June 23 start.

item.title: Last-call for Prime Day shopping: We found 175+ deals on Apple, Ninja, Lego, Sony, and DJI products
item.description: Amazon's summer sale is ending soon. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, OLED TVs, Sony headphones, and Apple Watches.

item.title: Somehow Samsung's 55-inch The Frame QLED TV is still in stock and on sale for just $697.99 for Prime Day — get it before the sale ends tonight
item.description: I can't believe this Prime Day deal is in stock, and it's ending soon — Samsung's 55-inch The Frame QLED TV is on sale for a record-low price of just $697.99.

item.title: The best Nintendo Switch deals on Prime Day: Last day discounts on the Switch 2 and eShop credit
item.description: Shop the best Prime Day Nintendo Switch deals at Amazon, as vetted by our deals experts.

item.title: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 140 great deals to choose from
item.description: We’ve arrived at the final day of Prime Day, which at this point should probably be called “Prime Week.” We’ve found discounts on all manner of gadgets, including TVs, smart home tech, chargers, headphones, and more. Some of the best deals have started selling out at some retailers, so if you’ve been craving a popular […]

item.title: The fastest-growing jobs in the creator economy dont require going viral
item.description: Two different panels at VidCons discussed the careers that can be built behind the camera.

item.title: The tech product dilemma: buy now or wait for lower prices?
item.description: Should you buy that laptop or smartphone you wanted right now? Or should you hold out for a better deal?

item.title: Bambu Lab 3D printer deals — these pro and budget 3D printers nailed our workshop tests and you won't find them in Amazon's Prime Day sale
item.description: We've tested all the top Bambu Lab 3D printers. These are the best prices right now (and no, they're not on Amazon).

item.title: Don’t miss super-cheap AirPods before these deals end! Here’s why I’d skip the $99 deal and get AirPods Pro 3 instead — you’ll thank me later
item.description: The $99 AirPods aren't great value, but the Pro absolutely rock, so here's why you should pay the extra.

item.title: Voici la meilleure opportunité du moment pour s’offrir la Xbox Series X (en blanche)
item.description: La Xbox Series X, console de salon la plus performante de Microsoft, profite actuellement d'une baisse de prix avantageuse. Vous pouvez ainsi retrouver cette machine de jeu haut de gamme à 504 euros au lieu de 549 euros chez E.leclerc.

item.title: Prime Day is ending — don't miss your chance to get up to $550 in free perks! Audiobooks, groceries, and even a $5 Caesar's pizza
item.description: These deals are on the house, but don't expect them to stick around long after Amazon Prime Day ends tonight.

item.title: We found 15+ Prime Day deals on microSD, portable SSDs, and hard drives to help you fight RAMageddon
item.description: With RAMageddon, memory prices are going way up. Shop Prime Day deals on portable SSDs, HDDs, and microSDs from Samsung, SanDisk, and Lexar.

item.title: We’re afraid to show you the NSFW statue of Lionel Messi
item.description: It’s not the first structure built in honor of the Argentine soccer legend, but it’s definitely the most talked-about. Lionel Messi just got a new 85-foot statue. While it is not the only structure built in honor of the Argentine soccer legend, it is for sure the most talked-about.

item.title: 18 Walmart deals that beat Amazon Prime Day: Lego sets, Ninja Slushi, Beats headphones, and Owala water bottles on sale
item.description: Walmart deals are better than Amazon Prime Day if you're shopping for the Ninja Slushi, AirPods Max 2, or Lego sets.

item.title: What streaming platforms wants from creators like The Besties
item.description: Streamers are increasingly outsourcing content discovery to creators. Here's what an Amazon exec has to share for those who want to follow in The Besties' footsteps.

item.title: These are the best deals you can still get on MacBooks before Apple’s price hike kicks in
item.description: Apple just raised the prices on Macs and iPads in response to the rising costs of memory chips, right in the middle of Amazon Prime Day. That means existing discounts (even small ones) on Apple laptops like the MacBook Neo, MacBook Air, and MacBook Pro just became significantly better deals. As an example, the 13-inch […]

item.title: It's a dumb time to buy an Xbox, even with the coming price hike
item.description: This is a prime example of a bad deal.

item.title: Ever wonder what people actually buy on Prime Day? Heres what Mashable readers have purchased so far.
item.description: Here are the best-selling Prime Day items according to Mashable readers, including a Switch 2 bundle, AirPods, and a solar generator.

item.title: Norton VPN adds split tunneling for Mac users in platform parity push
item.description: Norton has added split tunneling to its MacOS VPN app, allowing Mac users to choose which traffic they send through their VPN

item.title: The entire Google Pixel 10 line is on sale right now, but there's only one model I'd buy before Prime Day ends
item.description: Here's why the Google Pixel 10a is the only Google phone I'm recommending for Prime Day.

item.title: Streaming live World Cup soccer games on airplanes is becoming a reality
item.description: In-flight internet has long been notoriously terrible, but United Airlines and other carriers are hoping to change that with SpaceX’s Starlink. Soccer fans may soon be able to catch more than just flights while traveling this summer on one of America’s largest airlines.
